title: Meow Mods
description: A simple modpack made for a simple server ;3
body:
Meow Mods is a simple modpack aimed for a small server with not many players. As a kitchen sink modpack mainly intend for multiplayer, It includes a variety of exploration, magic and technology aspects for everyone's liking! It doesn't have a set or recommended progression like other modpacks since its goal is for it to improve your SMP experience by simply adding a bunch more of content for those who are tired of always having the same stuff on minecraft. This modpack is still receiving braking changes and updates, and will keep going so for the forceable future, as it's a modpack coming from an ongoing SMP series that evolves with each season coming! THIS IS UN UNSTABLE MODPACK! IF YOU WANT A PREDICTABLE AND STABLE EXPERIENCE GO SOMEWHERE ELSE! This modpack requires at least 4Gb of RAM to run. But if you want to be here for a wild ride, fell free to join! \>wO
A special thank you to all the developers of the mods in this pack!
